In this mutilated way the Spokes-
man-Review now publishes references
to the eminent fairness Of the candi-
date as testified to by one of three
unions involved. The business agent
of the trades council at the time the
question of arbitration was preached
was f. F. Quinn, and 1t was he who

er MS one of the arbitrators. Quinn
is an active democratic worker and
may be seen almost any day about
democratic headquarters. He was
also the director general of the
trades council carnival Of a year ago
last summer which made q profit of
$40 net. These are the facts, and
from them one may easily CLEAN an
idea of the channels through which
II came about that that plumbers
